reason: New /message/stream must keep RoomState contract, stage rules, scripted fallback, and no-raw-token invariants.
Streaming message reuses invoke/fallback provider order; must fall back safely with no key.
LLM failure on the streaming send must fall back to the deterministic reply, not break the turn.
useRoom streaming send/optimistic update and playDemo reveal follow the streaming-hook patterns.
Optimistic message + reasoning are streaming state in the room hook; backend stays source of truth on done.
Change spans API route, room service, api client, hook, and component.
